sources.promptText: Create one exact 1086x1448 PNG for GemDuel Visual Lab replacement prompt SURFACE-REVIEW-2026-04-27-opal-rain-B-market-card-back-l3. Source kind: candidate. Original candidate asset path to improve: assets/art-library/surface-autonomous-legendary-styles-candidates/2026-04-27/market-card-back-l3/opal-rain/market-card-back-l3-b.png. No text, numbers, Chinese, English, Roman numerals, logos, watermarks, fake glyphs, UI labels, baked cards, baked counters, gameplay controls, hover rings, or selection states. React renders all labels, counts, icons, levels, gems, buttons, and gameplay affordances. Market L1/L2/L3 must remain a coherent tiered card-back family; L1 must still include a restrained center ornament and may not have an empty center. Preserve the successful style identity from the original set, but fix the marked slot according to the human instruction. Do not include text, numbers, Chinese, English, Roman numerals, logos, watermarks, fake readable glyphs, UI labels, counters, cards, buttons, hover rings, selection states, screenshots, contact-sheet layouts, or app chrome. React renders all labels, counts, icons, levels, gems, buttons, cards, hover rings, selection states, and gameplay affordances. Return a single clean game asset image only.
